readiness_reasons: Segment revenue and gross margin not disclosed for PV Inverters, ESS, Hydrogen, or AIDC; disaggregation relies on unverified sell-side proxies.
Diluted share count cannot be reliably computed from supplied evidence (Tushare total_share missing; market cap/price inconsistent; parent profit/EPS conflict).
Capex and FCF derived from limited Q1 filing extracts; full-year FY2025 cash-flow detail is unavailable.
AIDC Power Solutions and Hydrogen business are nascent and unquantified; only qualitative cue exists.
US exposure and tariff impact are debated but not reconciled with segment-level order data.
Forecast lines are analytical estimates pending company disclosure or verified third-party data.
Material segment three-year driver lines are missing: AIDC Power Solutions, Energy Storage Systems, Hydrogen Business, PV Inverters
Valuation closure conflicts with probability-weighted scenario value.
Valuation has not closed from mutually exclusive buckets to per-share fair value.
volume_price_cost driver chain is incomplete; missing: utilization, unit/input cost
Three-year values remain missing for consolidated line(s): EPS

company_model.business_archetype: High-R&D power electronics manufacturer with global clean-energy platform ambitions, organized around PV inverters, energy storage systems, hydrogen electrolyzers, and AIDC power solutions. Revenue = volume × ASP across products and regions; profit = gross margin − SG&A/R&D − financing cost; cash flow = profit adjusted for project-linked working capital and expansion capex.
company_model.value_proposition_and_customers: Supply reliable, bankable, and high-efficiency PV inverters, utility-scale/C&I energy storage systems, electrolyzers, and solid-state transformers to developers, EPCs, utilities, and data-center hyperscalers globally. Revenue comes from hardware sales, service contracts, and integrated turnkey solutions.
company_model.revenue_equation: Consolidated Revenue (CNY) ≈ Σ [segment shipments (GW/GWh/units) × segment ASP (CNY/W or CNY/Wh)] adjusted for regional mix and service/warranty revenue.
company_model.profit_equation: Gross Profit = Revenue − Material/Battery/Component costs − Manufacturing overhead; Operating Profit = Gross Profit − R&D − Selling & Distribution − G&A; Parent Net Profit = Operating Profit + Investment/Fair-value movements − Finance costs − Tax − Minority interests.
company_model.cash_flow_equation: Operating Cash Flow = Parent Net Profit + Non-cash items (depreciation, impairment) ± Δ Working Capital (receivables, inventory, contract liabilities, prepayments); FCF = Operating Cash Flow − Capex (production lines, Poland factory, R&D facilities).
company_model.capital_intensity_and_reinvestment: Revenue growth requires continuous R&D (≈4.7% of revenue) and capacity/buildout capex. ESS and PV inverter manufacturing is asset-light relative to chemicals/mining, but project-linked contract liabilities and receivables tie up working capital. Mid-term capex includes the Poland ESS factory (ramp-up H1 2027).
company_model.share_count_formula: Not calculable from supplied evidence: Tushare total_share missing, market cap (261,556 mn) / close price not available, parent profit (13,461 mn) / EPS leads to circular logic with unverified EPS.
share_count_cross_checks: Expect total_share from Tushare in 10,000-share units; convert to mn.
Check filing dates for potential EPS column-shift or rounding errors.
moat_mechanisms: Brand and Bankability: Proven inverter and ESS track record reduces developer risk; certifications and installed base create repeat-order stickiness.
Scale and Cost: High volume procurement of components (IGBTs, batteries) and amortized R&D across larger revenue.
Global Service Network: In-house service and commissioning teams lock in O&M contracts.
moat_to_financial_transmission: Bankability → lower price elasticity, premium ASP, stable gross margin (31-34%).
Scale → operating leverage reduces SG&A/Revenue ratio over time.
Service network → recurring revenue and customer retention; softens cyclicality.
structural_risks: Geopolitical and tariff risk: US OBBA, inverter bans, EU exclusion from public-funded projects could destroy a high-margin demand pool.
Technology disruption: Solid-state transformers, new battery chemistries, or competitor breakthroughs could erode current power-electronics moat.
Working capital pro-cyclicality: Project-linked inventory and receivables balloon in upcycles but contract liabilities shrink in downturns, compressing cash flow.
key_unknowns: Precise US revenue and gross profit exposure across PV and ESS.
ESS order-to-revenue conversion schedule and margin profile.
Timing and magnitude of AIDC SST commercialization.
True normalized diluted share count and EPS trajectory.

business_unit_map.economic_role: Core revenue and profit contributor; high-margin power electronics product line.
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: Gross Profit = Revenue − Material/Component Cost; Margin ≈ 34-37%
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: Cash: moderate receivables, payables; Capex: expansion lines; FCF positive.
business_unit_map.next_verification: Track segment disclosure in H1 2026 report or management roadshow.

business_unit_map.economic_role: Largest growth engine; project-based with long cycle; margin recovery underway.
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: Gross Profit = Revenue − Battery/Core Component Cost; Margin ≈ 30% (Q1 2026, company IR).
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: Cash: large contract liabilities (CNY 122 bn) support future revenue; high working capital; Capex: Poland factory for local content.
business_unit_map.next_verification: Check Q2 2026 ESS revenue split and backlog commentary.

business_unit_map.economic_role: Technology/market development seed; qualitative orders, pre-profit.
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: Gross Profit not disclosed; likely negative after R&D and SG&A allocation.
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: Cash: investment phase, negative OCF; Capex: pilot production.
business_unit_map.next_verification: Monitor first material revenue or project delivery announcement.

business_unit_map.economic_role: Future option on AI data-center power; pre-revenue but SST product is technology-leading.
business_unit_map.revenue_driver_equation: Revenue = SST Units/Systems × ASP; preliminary demand in hundreds of MWh.
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: Margin expected high due to low customer price sensitivity and high barrier; still zero.
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: Cash: initial capex and R&D; no material revenue yet.
business_unit_map.next_verification: Track first SST commercial contract announcement.

segment_models.products_or_services: Grid-tied and off-grid PV inverters, string inverters, central inverters, and related monitoring/communication equipment.
segment_models.customers_and_channel: Developers, EPCs, utilities; direct sales and channels, global distribution.
demand_and_order_drivers: Replacement cycle for older inverters (5-10 year life)
US/EU policy changes on domestic content and inverters
segment_models.industry_supply_and_capacity: Sufficient global capacity; company expanding lines; competitive but volume leaders maintain share.
segment_models.volume_share_utilization: Company is share leader; volume driven by global installations; Q1 2026 overall revenue decline not from this segment alone (not split).
segment_models.price_asp_take_rate: ASP under moderate pressure; mitigated by product mix shift to high-power string and hybrid inverters.
segment_models.unit_cost_and_input_prices: Rely on IGBTs and other power semiconductors; component costs stable to slightly rising.
segment_models.margin_and_operating_leverage: Gross margin target 34%±; operating margin benefits from scale but offset by rising R&D and SG&A.
segment_models.working_capital_and_cash_conversion: Receivables driven by project milestones; typical 90-120 day cycle; OCF healthy but margins compressed.
segment_models.causal_analysis: Inverter demand remains structurally financed by global decarbonization spend; near-term headwinds from US tariff uncertainty and potential EU public-fund exclusion, but overall installations rise. Company's global brand and service moat support share gains and margin resilience.
segment_models.valuation_treatment: Core earnings: stable PE 30-35x normalized by brand premium.
strongest_counterevidence: No segment revenue split in Q1 2026; difficult to quantify US inverter ban downside.
segment_models.next_verification: H1 2026 filing – look for PV inverter segment revenue and commentary on US/EU.

segment_models.products_or_services: Utility-scale and C&I energy storage systems, battery management, power conversion, and turnkey solutions.
segment_models.customers_and_channel: Developers, utilities, large C&I users; project-based contracts with tenders.
demand_and_order_drivers: Global storage tenders and awarded GWh (>100GWh market)
AIDC co-location and US utility-scale demand
OBBA tariff window created pull-forward in 2025
segment_models.industry_supply_and_capacity: Chinese players dominant; Europe requiring local content (Poland factory ramping H1 2027).
segment_models.volume_share_utilization: Q1 2026 shipments flat YoY; contract liabilities of CNY 122 bn signal strong future deliveries.
segment_models.price_asp_take_rate: System ASP declining with battery cost deflation, but regional mix improvement (higher EU share) boosts realized margin.
segment_models.unit_cost_and_input_prices: Battery cell cost is primary driver; lithium prices bottoming-out but stable; upstream procurement optimized.
segment_models.margin_and_operating_leverage: Q1 2026 gross margin improved to ~30% due to regional mix (Europe); low- to mid-30s % target medium-term.
segment_models.working_capital_and_cash_conversion: Project pre-payments and contract liabilities provide cash visibility; inventory build for large deliveries creates short-term drag.
segment_models.causal_analysis: Revenue growth re-accelerating as contract liabilities convert; US orders pulled forward but Europe and AIDC co-location demand add new vectors. Gross margin trajectory improving sequentially; structural risk is battery cost pass-through in competitive regions.
segment_models.valuation_treatment: Core earnings: PE 25-30x reflecting higher project risk but strong growth.
strongest_counterevidence: US 38.4% tariff and OBBA buffer may dampen new order growth; Q1 shipments flat.
segment_models.next_verification: Q2 2026 preliminary results or trading update on ESS revenue and margin.

segment_models.products_or_services: Alkaline and PEM electrolyzers for green hydrogen production.
segment_models.customers_and_channel: State-owned energy groups, chemical plants, project developers.
demand_and_order_drivers: Project pipeline from Inner Mongolia/desert bases
segment_models.industry_supply_and_capacity: Nascent; multiple competitors; technology still evolving.
segment_models.price_asp_take_rate: Not disclosed; likely price-sensitive for alkaline tech.
segment_models.unit_cost_and_input_prices: High; production lines not yet at scale.
segment_models.margin_and_operating_leverage: Not disclosed; likely low or negative standalone.
segment_models.causal_analysis: Small revenue base; policy-driven long-term TAM but commercialization is 3-5 years away.
segment_models.valuation_treatment: Optionality: can be SOTP'd at peer EV/Revenue 2-3x on FY2028 estimated sales.
strongest_counterevidence: No revenue or margin quantification in any filing.
segment_models.next_verification: Check FY2025 annual report segment note for hydrogen revenue.

segment_models.products_or_services: Solid-state transformers (SST), AIDC storage integration, power distribution equipment for data centers.
segment_models.customers_and_channel: Hyperscale cloud and AI data center operators; direct partnership model.
demand_and_order_drivers: Customer certification unlocks large framework contracts
segment_models.industry_supply_and_capacity: Technology-leading; few competitors at 35kV/800V SST; high barrier.
segment_models.volume_share_utilization: Pilot orders (hundreds of MWh); no material revenue yet.
segment_models.price_asp_take_rate: SST priced at premium vs. conventional; low customer price sensitivity.
segment_models.unit_cost_and_input_prices: Custom SiC/MOSFET modules and magnetics; high initial cost.
segment_models.margin_and_operating_leverage: Expected high gross margin (40%+) upon commercialization; currently zero.
segment_models.working_capital_and_cash_conversion: Pre-commercial; cash outflow for R&D and certification.
segment_models.causal_analysis: Large optionality if AIDC power becomes standard; current valuation contains zero for this. Progress measured by partner announcements and first EPC contract.
segment_models.valuation_treatment: Optionality: probability-weighted EV/Revenue or DCF on 2028-2029 estimate.
strongest_counterevidence: No orders or revenue disclosed; still pre-revenue.
segment_models.next_verification: SST customer qualification announcement or AIDC policy tender.

underwriting_questions.question: What is the quantified impact of US inverter ban and EU public-fund exclusion on SunGrow's PV inverter revenue and margin?
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: PV inverters contribute ~60% of revenue and likely 65%+ of gross profit. US and EU are the highest-margin regions. A ban would reduce ASP, volume, and mix, compressing EPS disproportionately.
underwriting_questions.current_answer: Unresolved. Brokers (Citi, Goldman) suggest expectations are conservative; official IR notes EU exclusion is still administrative guidance. No segment revenue split available.
bull_evidence: Citi: 'possible US ban might be a red herring' (KPE05)
Company: 'strengthening non-EU public-fund projects and local supply chain' (EV090)
US is ~20% of total revenue per sell-side (KSI04), manageable.
bear_evidence: US OBBA 38.4% tariff exists; FCC-focused inverter bill draft (KPE02, KPE03)
EU Commission guidance excludes 'high-risk country' inverters from funded projects (EV090)
No B-share for US/EU disclosed; opacity implies potential larger hit.
decisive_model_variables: PV Inverter segment volume (GW) -> US/EU share
affected_financial_lines: Segment revenue; Consolidated revenue; Gross profit; Operating profit; Parent net profit; EPS
missing_evidence: Company's US PV inverter order book and backlog in GW/CNY
underwriting_questions.next_verification: Track FCC rulemaking, Q2 2026 order commentary, and any company US/EU revenue disclosure.

underwriting_questions.question: Can SunGrow sustain >30% gross margin in Energy Storage Systems through 2026-2028 given battery cost trends, regional mix, and US tariff pull-forward?
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: ESS is the highest-growth unit but margin has been volatile (18-30%). A sustainable 30%+ base case supports re-rating; a drop to 25% undermines profit estimates and FCF.
underwriting_questions.current_answer: Q1 2026 ESS gross margin improved to ~30%, mainly from regional mix shift to Europe. Company confirms cost pass-through varies by region (EV091).
bull_evidence: Contract liabilities of CNY 122 bn signal strong demand, enabling pricing power
Europe exposure growing, Poland factory to further qualify for local-content premium
bear_evidence: Q1 shipments flat YoY; US orders pulled forward, leaving a potential gap in H2 2026-2027
Lithium price bottoming but could rise with demand, squeezing margin
Chinese domestic market and competitive regions have limited cost pass-through ability
decisive_model_variables: Regional mix (EU vs. US vs. China) share
affected_financial_lines: ESS segment gross profit; Consolidated gross margin; Operating profit; Parent net profit; EPS
missing_evidence: Monthly/quarterly ESS ASP and battery cost spread
US vs. Europe order book by quarter
underwriting_questions.next_verification: Q2 2026 ESS revenue and gross margin update; Polish factory commissioning progress.

underwriting_questions.question: When will contract liabilities of CNY 122 bn convert into revenue and at what margin? Can SunGrow accelerate delivery and cash collection?
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: The massive contract liability balance represents pre-sold projects. The speed and margin of conversion directly determine Q2-Q4 2026 revenue and OCF. Slow conversion or margin erosion signals demand or execution problems.
underwriting_questions.current_answer: Company refuses to give Q2 guidance. Contract liabilities up sharply; prepayments up 201% for material lock-in. Suggests confidence in large delivery pipeline.
bull_evidence: CNY 122 bn in contract liabilities is ~1.4x FY2025 revenue
Prepayments up 201% indicates firm purchase commitments for large batches
Management language '稳中向好' despite soft Q1
bear_evidence: Q1 2026 OCF/net profit ratio only 0.53; working capital draining cash despite pre-sales
Inventory/Revenue ratio elevated; risk of write-down if delivery schedule slips
No explicit Q2 revenue or margin guidance, implying near-term uncertainty
affected_financial_lines: Consolidated revenue; Operating cash flow; Free cash flow; Net working capital
missing_evidence: Project delivery schedule and revenue recognition milestones
Breakdown of contract liabilities by expected conversion quarter
Inventory composition (finished goods vs. raw materials)
underwriting_questions.next_verification: Q2 2026 quarterly report: revenue, OCF, and change in contract liabilities.

underwriting_questions.question: What is the capital allocation strategy—balancing high R&D/capex for AIDC and Hydrogen with shareholder returns?
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: R&D spend is ~CNY 4.2 bn/year and capex for Poland factory is ongoing. Pursuing AIDC SST and hydrogen may dilute near-term FCF and ROIC. The decision between reinvestment and dividends/buybacks changes the investable FCF profile.
underwriting_questions.current_answer: R&D intensity about 4.7%; no explicit FCF or ROIC target given. Dividend of 0.69 CNY/share implemented May 2026 (yield ~1.7%).
bull_evidence: AIDC SST is high-barrier, high-margin option that could justify the investment
Strong net cash position provides flexibility
bear_evidence: R&D growth +32% YoY faster than revenue +15%; returns unclear
Poland factory is a large capex outlay with uncertain ROI given EU local-content competition
No buyback despite share price weakness; potential dilution risk
affected_financial_lines: Free cash flow; Diluted EPS; Net cash position; ROIC
missing_evidence: FY2026-2028 capex plan and expected ROIC for Poland and SST lines
Management's medium-term shareholder return policy (payout ratio target)
Dilution from employee incentives or acquisitions
underwriting_questions.next_verification: FY2026 interim report capex breakout and management discussion on capital allocation.

underwriting_questions.question: What is the realistic size and timeline of AIDC SST monetization, and should it receive explicit optionality value?
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: Company claims technology leadership in SST (35kV/800V). If commercialized, it could add a third leg to growth beyond PV and ESS, justifying a higher multiple. Currently no revenue; quantifying the TAM and win probability changes fair value.
underwriting_questions.current_answer: SST prototype ready; pilot orders in hundreds of MWh; no revenue or contract value disclosed.
bull_evidence: Sell-side flagging SST as a sector catalyst (KPE07)
Global AIDC capex boom creates huge addressable market
bear_evidence: Zero firm contracts or revenue disclosed
Competing technologies (traditional UPS, other vendors) exist
Enterprise data center sales cycle is long and certification-heavy
affected_financial_lines: Optionality value per share; Fair value
missing_evidence: First named customer and contract size
underwriting_questions.next_verification: Company SST partnership announcement or first commercial order.

forecast_lines.formula: Base (FY2025) = 89,184 mn. 2026E growth +8% (moderate gain from ESS backlog conversion offset by US tariff drag). 2027E +4% (US gap partially offset by Europe/AIDC). 2028E +4% (steady state organic).
forecast_lines.key_sensitivity: 1% revenue miss → ~CNY 963 mn; impacts EPS by ~0.25 CNY/share (using estimated 2,300 mn shares).
missing_inputs: Poland factory start-up delay or acceleration

forecast_lines.formula: 2025 base = 31.8%. 2026E +0.9pp to 32.7% driven by ESS regional mix improvement and continued cost control. 2027E +0.3pp to 33% with ESS margin stabilizing and PV innovation. 2028E +0.4pp to 33.4% from AIDC SST high-margin contribution.
forecast_lines.key_sensitivity: 50bp GM miss → ~CNY 480 mn less gross profit; ~0.12 CNY EPS impact.

forecast_lines.formula: Operating Profit = Gross Profit − (Revenue × SG&A/R&D ratio) − Other operating costs (assumed ~0.5% of revenue).
Net finance income/expense including interest, FX, and investment gains. 2026E slightly negative due to higher rates; 2027-2028E improvement from net cash interest income.
Parent Net Profit = (Operating Profit + Finance & Other Items) × (1 − effective tax rate ~12%) − minority interest (~2%).
forecast_lines.key_sensitivity: EPS driver; 5% profit miss = ~0.30 CNY EPS (@ est. 2,300 mn shares).
missing_inputs: Diluted share count for EPS calculation

forecast_lines.formula: EPS = Parent Net Profit / Diluted Shares. Not calculated because diluted shares are unresolved (Rule 5a).
Assumed OCF/Net Profit ratio improves from 0.53 → 0.70 by 2028. 2026E ratio 0.60, 2027E 0.65, 2028E 0.70.
forecast_lines.key_sensitivity: Cash conversion critical for valuation; 0.1 ratio swing = ~1.5 bn FCF difference.
missing_inputs: Exact cash conversion cycle improvement milestones

forecast_lines.formula: 2025 base estimated from R&D+core capex. 2026E elevated for Poland factory (EV040). 2027-2028E normalize to maintenance + expansion.

operating_assumptions: US inverter ban does not pass or exempts necessary categories; US orders resume H2 2026.
ESS gross margin holds at 32%+ on EU premium and battery cost deflation; Poland factory ramps smoothly.
AIDC SST secures a top-3 hyperscaler partnership and contributes CNY 2 bn+ revenue by 2028.
Cash conversion improves to 0.80 OCF/Net profit; FCF swells.
scenarios.falsification: US ban passes; Q2/Q3 ESS margin drops below 28%; no SST contract by mid-2027.
missing_inputs: Diluted share count for EPS quantification

operating_assumptions: Current US/EU policy status quo: limited incremental bans; US inverter orders remain subdued but not lost.
ESS margin stable at 30%±1pp; revenue growth from Europe and AIDC co-location offsetting US pull-forward gap.
AIDC SST remains pre-revenue through 2028; treated as free optionality.
scenarios.falsification: Q2 2026 parent profit run-rate below CNY 3.0 bn; ESS margin slips below 28%.
missing_inputs: Diluted share count for EPS quantification

operating_assumptions: US inverter ban enacted and EU follows with strict exclusion; US/EU inverter market largely lost.
ESS gross margin compressed to 25% on battery cost inflation and severe China price war; Poland factory delayed.
FCF break-even due to high inventory and capex overhang; leveraged.
AIDC SST fails to commercialize in time.
scenarios.falsification: US ban status quo; Q2 ESS margin holds >28%; OCF returns to positive trend.
missing_inputs: Diluted share count for EPS quantification

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: US inverter ban severs the high-margin Americas cable.
thesis_financial_bridges.operating_driver: US/EU PV inverter volume and ASP
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: ∆ Segment Revenue = (US/EU Shipments × ASP) - (Replaced ROW volume × Lower ASP); ∆ Segment Gross Profit = ∆ Revenue × Segment Gross Margin.
thesis_financial_bridges.base_assumption: US 20% of PV inverter revenue lost; replaced with low-margin RoW. Revenue impact -CNY 5 bn, profit -CNY 2 bn.
thesis_financial_bridges.bull_assumption: Ban avoided; orders resume. Revenue +CNY 3 bn above base.
thesis_financial_bridges.bear_assumption: Ban plus EU exclusion. Revenue -CNY 12 bn, profit -CNY 4 bn.
thesis_financial_bridges.revenue_impact: From +3 bn to -12 bn variance vs base.
thesis_financial_bridges.profit_impact: From +1.2 bn to -4.0 bn gross profit.
thesis_financial_bridges.eps_impact: Est. ~0.30 CNY/share per CNY 1 bn profit change.
thesis_financial_bridges.fcf_or_capital_impact: FCF moves directionally with profit; no capex change.
missing_inputs: Exact US/EU PV inverter revenue and profit contribution

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: ESS margin trajectory determines mid-cycle earnings power.
thesis_financial_bridges.operating_driver: ESS gross margin % and regional mix
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: ESS Gross Profit = Revenue × Gross Margin; expansion from 28.5% to 32% adds 3.5pp.
thesis_financial_bridges.base_assumption: Margin steady at 30%; revenue CNY 35 bn 2027E.
thesis_financial_bridges.bull_assumption: Margin improves to 33%; revenue CNY 40 bn. Profit +CNY 1.52 bn.
thesis_financial_bridges.bear_assumption: Margin falls to 25%; revenue CNY 30 bn. Profit -CNY 1.75 bn.
thesis_financial_bridges.fcf_or_capital_impact: Higher margin accelerates cash release from contract liabilities.
thesis_financial_bridges.valuation_impact: Re-rating from 25x to 35x if 33% margin proven sustainable.
missing_inputs: Battery cost index and contract pricing details

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: AIDC SST transforms SunGrow into a data-center power infrastructure company.
thesis_financial_bridges.operating_driver: SST order book and conversion to revenue by 2028.
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: SOTP Value = 2028E Segment Revenue × EV/Revenue multiple (4-6x).
thesis_financial_bridges.bull_assumption: Revenue CNY 2 bn with 45% margin; value CNY 10-12 bn using 5x EV/Revenue.
thesis_financial_bridges.valuation_impact: Adds CNY 12-15 per share in bull (+5%).

moat_evidence_tests.moat_mechanism: Brand and bankability reduce sales-cycle risk and enable margin premium.
moat_evidence_tests.observable_test: Compare SunGrow PV inverter gross margin (FY2025 ~34%) vs. Chinese peers (e.g., Ginlong, GoodWe, TBEA) and check repeat order rate.
moat_evidence_tests.comparison_basis: Tongwei, TBEA, Ginlong reported gross margins (need Tushare filing data).
moat_evidence_tests.evidence_result: Partial: SunGrow 34% margin is top-tier; F500 bankability is cited but not independently verified.
moat_evidence_tests.financial_transmission: 1pp margin premium over peers → ~CNY 0.9 bn extra gross profit.
moat_evidence_tests.strongest_counterevidence: Q1 2026 consolidated margin -1.87pp YoY suggests near-term pricing pressure even for leader.
moat_evidence_tests.next_verification: Obtain peer inverter margins from Tushare financials for direct comparison.

moat_evidence_tests.moat_mechanism: Scale and global service network lock in customers and reduce service cost.
moat_evidence_tests.observable_test: SG&A/Revenue ratio trend over 3 years and service attach rate.
moat_evidence_tests.evidence_result: Unproven: SG&A grew +28% in FY2025 vs revenue +15%; no evidence of service-attach-rate shown.
moat_evidence_tests.financial_transmission: If SG&A growth normalizes to revenue growth, operating profit can expand by 2-3 pp.
moat_evidence_tests.strongest_counterevidence: SG&A growth outpacing revenue signals scale diseconomies or aggressive expansion.
moat_evidence_tests.next_verification: Check Q2 2026 SG&A/revenue ratio and service revenue disclosure.

valuation_buckets.valuation_method: PE multiple on 2027E parent net profit
valuation_buckets.metric_and_period: Parent net profit 2027E base case CNY 15,100 mn
valuation_buckets.double_counting_treatment: External to SOTP; equity value of operating business before considering optionality.
missing_inputs: Diluted share count for per-share conversion

valuation_buckets.double_counting_treatment: SOTP addition; revenue not consolidated in base-case segment profit, but value is risk-adjusted.
SOTP addition; separate from core earnings.
missing_inputs: Probability, revenue, and multiple are highly speculative

valuation_closure.formula: FWPS = Σ (Scenario Prob × Scenario FVPS) + Option Value. Core value derived from 30x base 2027E profit; fair-value PE = 219 * 2300 / 15100 ≈ 33.2x.
valuation_closure.rating_consistency_check: Fair value per share CNY 219 vs. current CNY 113.72 → notable upside, but EPS not quantified due to missing share count; scenario valuation avoids explicit price-target recommendation.
double_counting_checks: Core earnings exclude hydrogen and AIDC profit; optionality buckets added separately.
Probability-weighted FVPS already consolidates bull/base/bear; not added again.
missing_inputs: FY2026/FY2027 actual EPS to benchmark PE
fair value does not reconcile to the probability-weighted scenario value

Monitor FCC rulemaking and company US orders

evidence_change_rules.financial_transmission: unchanged/watch: no model assumption or scenario probability change until Cross-check with Q2 actual results and US policy developments

reconciliation_checks: Revenue 2025 base matches EV012 annual figure 89,184 mn.
Q1 2026 revenue is 15,561 mn; Q1 peak weighting not applied; year built top-down.
Gross margin Q1 2026 33.26% in EV014; blended 2026E assumes improvement from ESS mix but not full annualization.
OCF/net profit ratio Q1 2026 0.53; improving to 0.70 over 3 years reflects working capital normalization.
No EPS line due to unresolved share count; scenario FVPS uses assumed 2,300 mn shares for indicative sizing only.
Probability-weighted fair-value CNY 215 is derived from scenarios, not an additional bucket.
analyst_instructions: Preserve the full three-year model with all material forecast lines.
Any change to Revenue, GM, Opex, Tax, Capex, or OCF ratios must be documented with an evidence id, old/new assumption, and recalculated EPS/FCF/value impact.
Share count is the single most critical missing input; retrieve total_share from Tushare and cross-check before publishing EPS.
Segment-level PV and ESS revenue weightings are analytical; replace with reported segment data as soon as company discloses H1 2026.
Do not assign a Buy/Hold/Sell rating; valuation closure provides fair-value range.
Track the five underwriting questions and update their current_answer when new evidence emerges.
preprocessing_notes: Segment revenue weight split estimated from sell-side commentary (KSI05) and Q1 IR clues; not reported by company.
Market cap and PE TTM from market_expectation are unverified; used for reference only.
No diluted share count from Tushare or filings; EPS line left null per Rule 5a.
Hydrogen and AIDC revenue assumed de minimis in base case; optionality value estimated separately.
Knowledge Planet sync incomplete; missing some June streams may contain relevant guidance.
